title: Where the goblins came from
summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.

title: Extracting contract insights with PwC’s AI-driven annotation on AWS
summary: This post was co-written with Yash Munsadwala, Adam Hood, Justin Guse, and Hector Hernandez from PwC. Contract analysis often consumes significant time for legal, compliance, and procurement teams, especially when important insights are buried in lengthy, unstructured agreements. As contract volumes grow, finding specific clauses and assessing extracted terms can become increasingly difficult to scale. […]

title: Organizing Agents’ memory at scale: Namespace design patterns in AgentCore Memory
summary: In this post, you will learn how to design namespace hierarchies, choose the right retrieval patterns, and implement AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)-based access control for AgentCore Memory.

title: Building AI-ready data: Vanguard’s Virtual Analyst journey
summary: In this post, you'll learn how Vanguard built their Virtual Analyst solution by focusing on eight guiding principles of AI-ready data, the AWS services that powered their implementation, and the measurable business outcomes they achieved.

title: Run custom MCP proxies serverless on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime
summary: This post shows you how to deploy a serverless MCP proxy on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime that gives you a programmable layer to implement proper governance, controls, and observability aligned with an organization's security policies.

title: Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
summary: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Pallas for people who know JAX but not kernels yet
Announcing Together AI and Adaption Partnership
summary: Together AI and Adaption partner to bring Together Fine-Tuning natively into Adaptive Data, helping teams optimize datasets, run fine-tuning, evaluate results, and deploy stronger open models.

title: DeepSeek-V4 Pro now available on Together AI
summary: DeepSeek-V4 Pro is now available on Together AI with 512K context, controllable reasoning modes, and cached-input pricing for long-context reasoning workloads like code agents, document intelligence, and research synthesis.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw Launch
summary: Zhipu AI highlights AutoClaw as a product that can be installed on any computer in one minute. It is presented as a named AI product in the company's lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo Released
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The page describes it as part of the company's new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 Announced as Flagship Agent Foundation Model
summary: Zhipu AI presents GLM-5 as a new flagship base model for agent engineering, claiming open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. It is also said to perform strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V Open-Source Vision Reasoning Model Released
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V as an open-source visual reasoning model with standout performance at the 100B scale. The company says it reaches same-scale SOTA visual understanding accuracy, supports tool calling natively, and handles 128K context.

title: AutoGLM Agent Model Announced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B Open-Sourced as GLM-PC Base Model
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader large-model agent ecosystem. The company says CogAgent-9B-20241220 is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS Concept, AutoGLM, and GLM-PC Released
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This announcement positions the company around an operating-system-like agent framework and new agent product lineup.

title: Agent OpenDay: AutoGLM and GLM-PC Progress Update
summary: At Zhipu AI's Agent OpenDay, the company shared new agent advances, including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step operations and working across apps. It also announced a more automated web-browsing experience for AutoGLM and said GLM-PC had entered internal testing.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability over the previous version. The release is presented as a new model/product update in the company's blog.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement positions it as a new speech model release.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment news item rather than a product launch.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The post indicates a preview model announcement and availability event.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks the formal release of a new foundation model/product version.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This is a named model/product release announced on the company's blog.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The item is a specific model release.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent it says marks the beginning of an era focused on delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise AI application rather than a research demo.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification highlights external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and noted it as open source. This positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.
